title: Nafrat Ki Aandhi
subTitle: Ravi Kapoor, a police officer and Sonu Dada, a former criminal join hands together to take down a notorious gangster, Chandi Das.

title: Aghaat
subTitle: Madhav is a noble union representative who faces opposition from Rustom, a vile man, in a bid to register the most members. When an employee loses his legs, Rustom's abhorrent antics test Madhav.

title: Bandini
subTitle: Devendra, a doctor working at a women's prison, falls for Kalyani, a convicted prisoner. However, things become complicated as the tale behind her crimes unfolds.

title: Janam
subTitle: Rahul, an aspiring filmmaker, struggles with the stigma of being a popular director's illegitimate child. His father, Virendra, has a change of heart after Rahul eventually wins a film award.

title: Dada
subTitle: Jeetu works as a mechanic, lives in a slum area and is all set to marry Kamini, the girl he loves. But his life is destroyed when he is arrested and convicted for killing Kamini's brother.

title: Raaste Kaa Patthar
subTitle: Jai, who lets his employer and superiors use his apartment for sordid trysts, falls in love with Nita, his employer's fiancee.

title: Ganwaar
subTitle: Gopal, the son of a generous landlord, disguises himself as an illiterate villager to protect the villagers from the cruel Vijay Bahadur, the brother of his step-mother.

title: Paappi Devataa
subTitle: Ram and Rahim become best friends after the latter offers shelter to Ram when he comes to Bombay. However, Ram is unaware that Rahim is involved in illegal activities.

title: Toofan
subTitle: Separated at birth, the paths of Shyam, a lousy magician unwittingly roped into a crime, and Toofan, a defender of the people, cross again years later as they reunite to avenge their father.

title: Shor
subTitle: Deepak, a young boy, loses his ability to speak due to a tragic accident. His heartbroken father, Shankar, works hard in order to treat him, but remains unaware of the fate awaiting him.

title: Shor
subTitle: Deepak, a young boy, loses his ability to speak due to a tragic accident. His heartbroken father, Shankar, works hard in order to treat him, but remains unaware of the fate awaiting him.

title: Naach Uthe Sansaar
subTitle: A rich man's daughter falls in love with a farmer and wants to marry him. However, her father not only disapproves of this but also humiliates his mother, which makes the farmer seek vengeance.

title: Ek Nari Ek Brahmachari
subTitle: Raj lives with his brother, Mohan, who has taken a vow of celibacy. Trouble brews when Neena, along with her son, walks into their house and claims that Mohan is the father of her child.

title: Neela Aakash
subTitle: Neela and Akash fall in love with each other after a comedy of errors. But her drunkard father disapproves of their union as she is the sole breadwinner of their family.

title: Jawani Diwani
subTitle: Vijay meets Neeta, the daughter of a Thakur, and falls in love with her. However, things change after he finds out that she has been promised to another man in marriage.

title: Caravan
subTitle: Sunita, a young woman, flees from her abusive marriage when her husband tries to kill her. She joins a travelling gypsy caravan en route to Bangalore and falls in love with its driver, Mohan.

title: Sarfarosh
subTitle: When three men frame an honest patriot and get him imprisoned, he vows to avenge himself. However, the only man standing in his way is an honest cop who, unknown to him, is his own son.

title: Mard
subTitle: Azad, a wealthy prosperous king, is locked in a dungeon by General Dyer who wants to take over his kingdom. Years later, Azad's son comes to his father's rescue and puts an end to Dyer's tyranny.

title: Alag Alag
subTitle: A village belle marries an older doctor for his money, while singer Neeraj moves in with a movie starlet in the hope of getting more work. However, unexpected events occur and change their lives.

title: Alag Alag
subTitle: A village belle marries an older doctor for his money, while singer Neeraj moves in with a movie starlet in the hope of getting more work. However, unexpected events occur and change their lives.

title: Awaara
subTitle: Born into poverty, Raj steals and works for a criminal gang in order to feed his mother. But when he meets and falls in love with his childhood friend, Rita, he vows to change his ways.

title: Biwi O Biwi
subTitle: To overcome with his love for Asha, singer Chandermohan masquerades as an army officer when her father, a retired military officer, refuses to let her marry a civilian.

title: Do Jasoos
subTitle: Two bumbling detectives, Dharamchand and Karamchand, are assigned to locate a multi-millionaire's daughter, who goes missing after she witnesses a murder.

title: Piya Ka Ghar
subTitle: Malti falls in love with Ram and marries him without knowing what to expect. When she goes to his house, she realises that he is very poor and she is stuck with him for the rest of her life.

title: Do Raaste
subTitle: Navendu looks after his stepmother and half-brothers to fulfil the promise he has made to his father. However, their family falls apart after one of them marries a rich, controlling woman.

title: Aadmi Aur Insaan
subTitle: Jai and Munish fall for the same girl, ruining their bond with each other. However, an unfortunate turn of events reveals the true nature of their friendship.

title: Kalicharan
subTitle: When Prabhakar, an honest cop, is murdered by Din Dayal, a powerful crime lord, Khanna recruits his doppelganger Kalicharan to defeat Din Dayal.

title: Kabeela
subTitle: Shobha, a poor woman living with her widower father, falls in love with a gypsy named Mangal. However, other men who wish to be with her make her life difficult.
